title: AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIMAY, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY ST. FRANCIS II

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, September 6, 2019; 115 OG No. 41, 11265 (October 14, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11404, August 22, 2019 ]

AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIMAY, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY ST. FRANCIS II

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Creation of Barangay St. Francis II.

- There is hereby created a barangay in the Municipality of Limay, Province of Bataan to be known as barangay St. St. Francis II.

SEC. 2.

Territorial Boundaries.

- The territorial boundaries of Barangay St. Francis II shall be identified as follows:

Line

Direction

Adjoining Lots/Features

52 to 67-1-2

Barangay St. Francis I, cad. 242, Limay Cadastre (Pb-03-000036)

2 to 10

SW & NW

Orion Cadastre, Cad. 241 (Pb-03-000035)

10 to 52

NE & SE

Manila Bay

SEC. 3.

Conduct and Supervision of Plebiscite.

- The plebiscite conducted and supervised by the Commission on Election (COMELEC) on September 14, 1997 pursuant to Provincial Ordinance No. 11, s. 1996 of the Sangguniang Panlalawigan of the Province of Bataan, which ratified the creation of barangay St. Francis II, shall serve as substantial compliance with the plebiscite requirement under Section 10 of Republic Act No. 7160, otherwise known as the "Local Government Code of 1991", as amended.

SEC. 4.

Incumbent Barangay Officials.

- The incumbent barangay officials of barangay St. Francis II shall continue to hold office until such time that their successors have been duly elected and qualified.

SEC. 5.

Public Infrastructure and Facilities

.-All public infrastructure and facilities for public use existing therein at the time of the approval of this Act are hereby transferred without cost or compensation to and shall be administered by Barangay St. Francis II.

SEC. 6.

Internal Revenue Allotment Shares.

- Barangay St. Francis II shall be entitled to Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) shares pursuant to Section 285 of Republic Act No. 7160, Otherwise known as the "Local Government Code of 1991", as amended.

SEC. 7.

Effectivity.

-This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the Official Gazette or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL ARROYO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of representatives on February 6, 2019, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 3, 2019, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 4, 2019.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 22 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
